description_long: This helmet features a streamlined, aerodynamic shell with a prominent central ridge and angular contours, giving it a futuristic appearance. The exterior is predominantly teal with bold magenta stripes running from front to back, creating a striking visual contrast. The front is equipped with a large, dark-tinted visor that covers the entire face area, providing ample protection and visibility. Small, pointed protrusions on the top and sides add to its dynamic design, while the rear has a wide opening, likely for ventilation or comfort. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with subtle panel lines and minor surface imperfections visible. No visible branding or logos are present, and the helmet lacks any obvious external vents or retention system.
description: A teal helmet with magenta stripes, featuring a full-face dark visor and a sleek, angular design with a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large, dark visor and central magenta stripe, with angular cheek contours and a pointed top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated, aerodynamic profile and the magenta stripe running horizontally across the side.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a wide opening at the back, two small top protrusions, and the continuation of the magenta stripes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same streamlined shape and magenta stripe pattern.
attribute_graphic_design: Bold magenta stripes over a teal base, creating a dynamic, sporty look with no text or imagery.
